# Genetic Callnet

> Genetic Callnet is a recruitment and HR solutions partner headquartered in India, with offices in the UAE and global delivery capability.

## What Genetic Callnet does

Genetic Callnet helps organizations build stronger teams through permanent recruitment, executive search, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), contract staffing, global recruitment, turnkey recruitment projects, recruitment research advisory, training and development, corporate HR events, and employee wellbeing programs.

## Areas of expertise

The team supports hiring across banking and financial services, information technology, manufacturing, FMCG, retail, live entertainment, real estate, and other specialist sectors. The company focuses on senior, leadership, and high-impact talent as well as scalable workforce needs.

## Locations and markets

Genetic Callnet is headquartered in India, has offices in the UAE, and supports organizations hiring across India, the UAE, Europe, Asia, and other global markets.
